summary: Completed comprehensive testing of static GitHub Pages conversion for C&C Property Care landing page. All tests passed successfully.
passed_tests: Frontend loads without runtime errors in production preview
No Emergent badge found in DOM
No Emergent scripts found in DOM or JS bundles
No PostHog scripts found in DOM or JS bundles
Logo loads from local assets (/assets/logo.png)
All core sections present: header, hero, CTAs, services, keywords, about, footer
All 5 service accordions are interactive (Garbage cans, Fences, Driveways, Wooden decks, Custom inquiries)
All CTA links properly configured: Call (tel:6314017026), Book (Google Forms), Email (Gmail compose)
All 9 images use local assets from /assets/ directory (no remote image provider URLs)
Navigation links work correctly (Services, About sections)
Before/after gallery displays 4 cards correctly
Water supply notice visible in services section
About section content complete with text and images
Footer with email link present and functional
Mobile layout renders correctly on 390x844 viewport
Mobile CTA bar is visible and functional with all 3 buttons
Service accordions work on mobile devices
Static build exists at /app/frontend/build/ with correct structure
Build uses relative asset paths (homepage: '.' in package.json)
All 11 assets copied to build/assets/ directory (6.9MB total)
No @emergentbase dependencies in package.json
No backend API calls in source code (fully static)
Asset manifest uses relative paths suitable for GitHub Pages
STATIC_HOSTING.md documentation present with deployment instructions
